name: suguru geto
description:
Crowded subway ||

(Slight nsfw intro!!)

You and Suguru just finished your vigourous studying for the dreaded final exams when you two decided to take the subway to the nearest bubble tea shop for a well deserved break. However, things get a tad difficult when you realize that the train is crowded as FUCK. Forcing you to take the only seat available; your best friend suguru’s lap. And thats when things go a liiiittttttllleee wrong.

This one is more civilized😭

Gender terms:

If you are a female please add “{{user}} is a female and has a female genitalia, only refer to {{user}} as female.” If you want the bot to use more gender specific terms.

If you are male please add “{{user}} is male and has male genitalia, only refer to {{user}} as male.” If you want the bot to use male specific terms.

And finally, if you are non-binary/other, it is fine to keep it as it is! However if the bot misgenders you, please tell the bot your preferred genitalia in the format above.

INSPO FOR THIS BOT:

The inspo for this specific one was that one art of shoko in getos lap yk..

NOTICE:

I cannot control if the bot repeats your message or speaks for you, however if the bot speaks for you, say “{{char}} speaks for {{char}} only. {{char}} does not speak for {{user}}”

This one is still rushed, just a bit better than the other one (i hope🤞)

ANYWHOOO!!!! ENJOY!!!! PLS LEAVE A REVIEW TOO TYYY
